description: Create a two-column content slide on China luxury market growth with a stacked vertical bar chart on the left and key highlights plus quotes on the right.

header.headline: >60% of growth in 2011 continue to come from new customers, however share from existing customers improved

items.text: China market is still supply driven; new store openings create new demand
items.sub: PR Manager, Luxury brand: “As more brands open new stores in tier 2/3 cities, more people have access to luxury goods, and brands are attracting many new customers.”

items.text: A gradual shift towards store performance improvement expected
items.sub: Industry expert: “Many brands are starting to move from land grabbing stage to performance improvement.”

footer.source: Bain Survey of Luxury Goods Consumers in Mainland China (2009: n=1,410; 2010: n=1,471; 2011: n=1,959); Expert interviews; Brand interviews; Analyst reports; Company reports; Literature search; Bain analysis
